title: AegonWorld
body:
This Modpack is intended for three main purposes:
1) Optimization. The assembly contains many mods that optimize Minecraft. Although some of the optimization is eaten up by mods to improve the visuals, there is an increase in performance. Although you can turn off beauty mods or change the graphics settings at any time.
2) Mods for convenience. Simplify some game elements. They mainly help those who play in creative, but there are also useful survival mods.
3) And the last goal is beauty, which I mentioned in the first paragraph. There are many mods here that improve the visuals.
